prompt: nul-lifestyle-1x1-04-v3d: Square 1:1 moody editorial fitness photograph. A woman in a dusty mauve ribbed athletic tank and dark forest-teal training shorts standing in a wide stance, performing a single-arm dumbbell lateral raise — a single black hex dumbbell with a chrome ridged grip held in her right hand, the arm caught actively swinging outward and upward through the lateral arc, just past horizontal at shoulder height. The other arm rests at her side anchored. Slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the rising arm and dumbbell — the entire arm from shoulder to fingers and the dumbbell itself smear into a clean curving arc-streak following the lateral-raise path, with translucent secondary exposures of the dumbbell visible at multiple stops along the arc (like a stop-motion of the lift trail). The body, face, and the resting arm remain tack-sharp and clearly legible. Dim warm tungsten light raking from frame-right, deep dark teal-olive shadows, painterly chiaroscuro. Subtle fine 35mm Cinestill grain — understated, not heavy. Halation around chrome highlights. No text, no logos.
